rulings.Case Title: JULIANA CLEGG VS. WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Confidential Information From The Record Or, Alternateively, To Seal The Record; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Melissa Sequete In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 16, 2020. line 3. DEFENDANT WILMINGTON TRUST, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, NOT IN ITS Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Confidential Information From The Record Or, Alternateively, To Seal The Record; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Melissa Sequete In Support Thereof is GRANTED as follows: (1) SSA is sealed; (2) all quotes, if any in Plaintiff's filings, from SSA are also sealed. Defendant to prepare order identifying documents and specific portions of the documents to be sealed consistent with this order. =(501/CFH)
